sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82744" key="peteurismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πετευρ-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n82744.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">vaulting, tumbling</tr_>: only metaph.
